title: Modern PvP Modpack
description: Every essential mod for pvp along with performance boosting mods. Shaders Supported! WITH CONFIG
body:
# **Modern PvP Modpack (WITH CONFIG)**

Fully polished and performance-tuned PvP modpack for those who want a smooth, modern, and competitive combat experience without the need to spend hours in configuring mods manually. Each and every mod in this pack is handpicked to enhance visibility, responsiveness, and overall PvP clarity.

This resource pack is perfect for duels, practice servers, Bedwars, Skywars, UHC, or even any form of PvP-oriented gameplay.

**What This Modpack Offers**

This is one modpack aiming at a clean and distraction-free environment for PvP as full of responsive features. The modification improves animations, hit feedback, crosshair, and UI elements in-game without ever touching Minecraft's core PvP, providing a smooth, modern feel that makes tracking opponents and timing hits considerably easier.

Utilities for PvP, like keystrokes, toggle sprint, zoom, and a variety of custom HUD elements have been included in order to make combat more intuitive and accessible.

**Performance & Visual Improvements **

The pack includes a selection of performance mods that are sure to boost FPS, reduce stutter, and optimize rendering. The visual clutter is slimmed down so that particles, damage indicators, and animations stay sharp and clear, rather than overwhelming.

The framte-rate is smoother, the visuals cleaner, and everything is more responsive- even on mid-range systems.

**Out-of-the-Box Ready**

One of the most important parts of this pack is its full configuration setup. All mods come with custom-tuned settings that balance visuals, readability, and performance. This means:

**UI mods are consistently aligned and styled

Pre-optimized crosshair and HUD layouts

The refinement of the animation and visual effects

Performance mods pre-set for speed**

You can install the pack and start playing right away, with no need to tinker with anything.

**Non-Conflicting Keybinds**

Every keybind has been checked and organized across all the mods. This way, it ensures that:

Zero keybind conflicts on first launch

No missing controls

Easy access to all the PvP gadgets

A cleaner and more intuitive control layout

Everything works right out of the box.

Made for Competitive PvP Whether it be grinding duels, learning combos, practicing bridging, or playing on minigame servers, this modpack delivers a modern setup specifically for PvP players. Smooth animations, responsive controls, and optimized visuals make for a polished experience that is at home with casual players and competitive fighters alike.
